demo_timestamps.description: Demonstration of Andrids using APS for workflow automation, reducing manual workload significantly.
Introduction of Autodesk Assistant and AI integration in design workflows.
DX Live streaming interoperability demonstration with model updates in Revit and Rhino.
Conceptual demonstration of Autodesk Assistant creating a door schedule in Revit
Autodesk Assistant generating visual review-ready images in Fusion
Autodesk Assistant in collaboration with Victory AI optimizing HVAC designs
Arquedes using Microsoft Co-Pilot Studio agent with Autodesk Assistant for project evaluation

themes: Interoperability and AI integration in AEC workflows
Integration of AI in Autodesk products

client_mentions.context: Using APS to automate at scale and integrate ACC into their systems.

client_mentions.context: Using IFC connector to manage incoming IFC files for documentation in Revit.

client_mentions.context: Using AAC data model and data exchange ecosystem for structured design data and model checks.

client_mentions.context: Partnering with Autodesk for project approvals using 3D BIM models and compliance checks.

client_mentions.context: Using Autodesk Generative Design for optimizing seatbelt attachments.

client_mentions.context: Utilizing Autodesk Platform Services for coordination on the Soetra Bridge project.

ai_technologies.name: Agentic AI
ai_technologies.context: Compared to a telescope for developers, enabling new workflows and opportunities.

summary: The Autodesk DevCon 2026 Keynote showcased the transformative impact of Agentic AI on software development and the AEC industry, emphasizing AI-driven workflow automation and real-time interoperability with models. Demonstrations highlighted Autodesk Assistant's role in enhancing efficiency in tools like Revit and Fusion, with innovative use cases from partners like Andrids and Deutsche Bahn. The session underscored the future of design and engineering powered by AI, data connectivity, and dynamic orchestration of connected systems to boost productivity and innovation.
